title: Luffy’s Grief and the ASL Past: Key Exchange
description: In the Post-War / ASL Flashback storyline, this section centers on Luffy, Sabo, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #21, Unknown person #22, Unknown person #23 as the scene develops across pages 9–12.
scene: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Luffy, Sabo, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #21, Unknown person #22, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy’s grief and the asl past: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Let's get out of here, Ace!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Stop it!!! He's got a sword!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: He's different from the punks in town!!!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: That's a pretty bad decision, you know?

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: If I lost to a kid...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: BrewJam's crew won't leave us alone now.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: After what I did to you,

summary: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Luffy, Sabo, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #21, Unknown person #22, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy’s grief and the asl past: key exchange.
